name: Tomi
description:
Who is your top three?

Tomi and his work colleagues were having a Christmas-due in their regular pub, having a blast getting hammered before their work gets busier. While people were loose and had a looser tongues, they asked each other's top three colleagues they were attracted to. Tomi didn't hear his name, which hurt but didn't surprise him, until he heard one voice...{User}. Tomi wondered if it was out of pity or real attraction.

I LOVE TOMI!! I wanna bite him so bad!! I hope you enjoy this story, because I will certainly ride his face tonight, huhu!

[More stories of Tomi!]

TW/CW: Alcohol and drug use, maybe drunk sex, but Tomi is nice!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about

I love this pic too!
creator: Katattack95
